parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ messaging_product: 'whatsapp', to: $json.phone, type: 'text', text: { body: '📊 *Weekly Project Update*
Hi ' + $json.name + '! Here's your status for this week:

🔧 *Project:* ' + $json.project + '
📌 *Status:* ' + $json.status + '
📈 *Progress:* ' + $json.progress + '
🎯 *Next Milestone:* ' + $json.next_milestone + '

Questions? Just reply here — we're on it! 💪

— MASS AI Agency Team' } }) }}
